items.statcast_observation: Isaac Collins produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 108.3 mph at a -8.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals beat the Houston Astros, KC 4, HOU 0. Stephen Kolek led the night, working 7.1 innings with 0 earned runs, 4 strikeouts and 1 walk. Isaac Collins supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.3 mph.
items.title: Royals vs Astros Recap
